name: Extract from uploaded files with Google Drive in real time

parameters.content:
### Daily Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — daily at 6:00. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Download from Google Drive

### Download from Google Drive

googleDrive — `download` operation against the connected account.

Next: Parse PDF Contents

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Parse PDF Contents

Parses the incoming PDF binary into JSON items.

Next: Clean & Reshape Rows

### Clean & Reshape Rows

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming document records to a stable schema

Next: Load Rows into Google Sheets

### Load Rows into Google Sheets

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Align Field Names

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Load Rows into Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

Next: Cap Batch Volume

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 50 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

# Extract from uploaded files with Google Drive in real time

**Pattern:** File Processing · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Extract from uploaded files with Google Drive in real time. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual invoices is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Daily Schedule → Download from Google Drive → Parse PDF Contents → Clean & Reshape Rows → Load Rows into Google Sheets → Align Field Names → Cap Batch Volume → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to file processing without manual effort
- Anyone automating invoices in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Improves response time
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Removes copy-paste errors

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your invoices process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
